component.name: abraflexi-enhancer
component.summary: Convert received invoice line items into AbraFlexi pricelist entries

description.p: AbraFlexi Invoice Enhancer is a web application that adds a trigger button to Received Invoices in AbraFlexi. When activated, it converts free-text invoice line items into structured pricelist entries and stores supplier prices for future reference.
Items are matched by EAN code or partner number. New pricelist entries are created automatically when no existing match is found.
